title: Silky Herbal Syrian Peanuts Stew
description: A comforting, eggfree stew brimming with roasted peanuts, chickpeas, and spinach, finished in a silky coconutmilk broth.
instructions: In a large pot, heat 2 tbsp olive oil over medium heat.
Add diced onion, minced garlic, and ginger; sauté until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes — this is the bhuna stage.
Whisk in tomato puree, cumin, coriander, paprika, turmeric, and cinnamon; cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add roasted peanuts, cooked chickpeas, and vegetable broth; bring to a gentle simmer and let flavors meld for 15 minutes.
Stir in coconut milk and fresh spinach; simmer until the spinach wilts, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then remove from heat.
Ladle the stew into bowls and garnish with chopped cilantro and a drizzle of coconut milk if desired.
Serve hot with warm flatbread or rice.
